title: The Dancin' Fool
writer: Henry Payson Dowst, Clara Genevieve Kennedy
actors: Wallace Reid, Bebe Daniels, Raymond Hatton
plot: Fresh from the country, Sylvester Tibble secures a six dollar-a-week job at his Uncle Enoch Jones's antiquated jug business. One night he drifts into a cabaret and meets dancer Junie Budd who teaches him her profession. They becom...
